name: Swing 365 Golf Colorado
about: Swing 365 Golf Colorado is a members-only indoor golf sanctuary located in Westminster. It features PGA TOUR Full Swing simulator technology, providing unlimited 24/7 access in a private studio environment. The venue caters to golfers seeking a premium, distraction-free space to practice, play, and improve their game without weather constraints or crowded facilities. Membership is required, with options including trial, monthly, and premium tiers designed for different levels of access and customization.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited 24/7 access to private, members-only studios
PGA TOUR Full Swing technology with precise ball and club tracking
No crowds or interruptions in a premium, distraction-free environment
Flexible membership options tailored to individual schedules and goals
Ability to bring guests, food, and drinks for social or business events

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring food and drinks; no in-house kitchen mentioned
Members can bring alcohol; BYOB policy confirmed

simulator_hardware.model: Trusted by PGA TOUR Major Champions
simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade simulator technology used by tour pros

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own clubs for use in the private studios.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members are encouraged to bring food and drinks to enjoy during their sessions.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: Time varies by simulator settings and pace of play, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours depending on the course and number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, Swing 365 is a members-only adults-focused venue with no specific amenities or programming for children.
